violations.text: Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/08/2026
Partition required between handsink and 3 bay sink at smoothie bar. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2025
The receptacle in the toilet rooms are lacking a cover. A toilet room shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary products. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025
